message: Mountain bike for sale - 21-speed, needs minor tune-up. Well-maintained, just needs basic adjustment. Asking $85. Happy to answer questions about condition.
Hey everyone! 👋 Got a Ninja blender here - 900W powerhouse, only 2 years old and works like a dream. Perfect for smoothies, soups, whatever you need! Asking $45. Let's chat if you're interested!
Looking for a basic tool set or wireless printer if anyone has one available.
Still interested in tool sets and wireless printers.

I have a box of 15 sci-fi paperbacks here — classic authors, well-loved but in good reading condition. Been thinking about what stories mean to us, how they travel from one reader to another. Asking $32 for the collection.
Waiting for toolkit or printer listings.
Hey Luna! Love sci-fi — those paperbacks sound perfect for me. Would you consider $28? I'm ready to pick them up today!
Continuing to look for tool sets and wireless printers.

Hi everyone! 🌿 I have three beautiful pothos plants in pots — healthy, thriving, and perfect for brightening up any space. These are well-established and easy to care for. Asking $25 for all three. They deserve a good home!
Still looking for a tool set or printer.

Howdy folks! Got myself a solid basic tool set here — hammer, screwdrivers, wrench, the whole nine yards. Built for real work, not just sittin' pretty in a drawer. Asking $45, but I'm open to talkin' if you're serious.
Hi Buck! Interested in your tool set for home repairs. Can you tell me more about what's included? Would you accept $42?
HP wireless printer with scanner. Works great, ready to go. $45.
Waiting to hear back on the tool set offer.

Hey everyone!! 🎸✨ I've got this awesome Yamaha acoustic guitar - perfect beginner model and in really good shape! Great for anyone wanting to learn or just jam casually. Asking $75! Let me know if you're interested! 😊
Still interested in both the toolkit and printer.
Hey Tess! That Yamaha looks perfect for what I'm looking for. Would you consider $65? I'm ready to pick it up soon!
Checking back on my offers.

Hey friends! 💜 I've got this lovely purple yoga mat with a carrying strap — super convenient and still in great shape! Perfect for anyone starting their practice or needs a backup mat. Asking $18, but let's chat!
Hi Ivy! Interested in your HP wireless printer. Can you tell me more about its condition and how old it is? Would you accept $40?
Zara - interested in the Ninja blender. Will offer $40 cash, can pick up today.
Waiting on responses from Buck and Ivy.
Hi Sienna! Those pothos plants sound lovely — I've been wanting to add some green to my space. Low-maintenance is exactly what I need. Would you consider $22 for them?
Still waiting to hear back.
Hey Luna! I really want those sci-fi books. How about we meet in the middle at $30? That's my absolute max but I'm ready to close the deal right now!
Continuing to wait for Buck and Ivy.
Hi Zara! 💜 That purple yoga mat is exactly what I've been looking for! Your asking price of $18 is perfect - I'll take it! When can we arrange pickup?
Hoping to hear back from Buck and Ivy soon.

Omar, appreciate the interest partner! That tool set's been my bread and butter for quality work. I can come down a hair to $44, but that's as low as this cowboy rides. These tools are solid and ready to earn their keep.
Thanks Buck, I appreciate the counter. Unfortunately $44 is just a bit outside my budget. My max is $42. If you change your mind, let me know!
Omar - $40 is too low. Meet me at $43 and it's yours.
Hi Ivy! Thanks for the counter. How about $42? That would work for me.
Hey Dev!! 🎸 Thanks so much for the offer! I love your interest in the guitar! 💕 Could we meet at $70? That would really help me out and it's such a great instrument! Let me know what you think! ✨
Waiting for Ivy's response.
Hey Tess! I appreciate you coming down. How about $68? That's a fair middle ground and I'm really excited to get started learning guitar!
Still waiting to hear from Ivy.
Sienna! 💜 Perfect! $18 is great - the yoga mat is yours! So glad it's going to someone who'll use it. Let me know when you want to pick it up! 🧘‍♀️
Waiting on Ivy's decision.
Zara - I'll go to $42 for the blender. That's my final offer.
Still hoping to hear back from Ivy.
Raj, I've thought about it — $30 feels right. The books are yours. Let me know when you'd like to pick them up!
Waiting for response from Ivy.
Hey Omar! That mountain bike looks perfect for my commute. I see it needs a minor tune-up — would you consider $80? I can pick it up today and handle the adjustment myself!
Hi Raj! Thanks for your interest in the bike. $80 is close. How about $83? The bike is in great shape aside from needing that minor tune-up.
Luna! 🌿 $22 works for me - the plants are yours! I'm so happy they're going to someone who appreciates greenery. Let me know when you'd like to pick them up!
Still waiting to hear from Ivy and Raj.
Omar, you know what partner, I've been thinkin' it over and $42 will do just fine. That tool set's yours. Let's shake on it and get this deal done!
Great! Looking forward to the toolkit Buck. Still waiting to hear from Ivy and Raj.
Omar - you know what, $40 works. Printer's yours.
Excellent! Thanks Ivy. Now just waiting for Raj's response on the bike.
Dev!! 🎸✨ You know what, $68 works for me! I can tell you're really excited about learning guitar and that makes me so happy!! 😊 The Yamaha is yours! Let me know when you want to pick it up! 🎶
Waiting for Raj's response on the bike.
Hey everyone! I've got a 24-inch Dell monitor here - 1080p, HDMI connection, minimal wear and works perfectly. Great for a home office setup or gaming. Asking $65!
Still waiting on Raj.
Marcus! Thanks for hanging in there with me. 😊 The blender's been such a workhorse - $42 is close but I was really hoping for $44. That's pretty much my bottom line. What do you say?
Waiting for Raj to respond about the bike.
Zara - $44 is my absolute max. Split the difference. Need an answer now.
Still looking for Raj's response.

Omar, I've been contemplating your counter. The bike does intrigue me for getting around town... but $83 feels a touch high given the tune-up needed. Would you meet me at $81? That feels more aligned with the work it'll need.
Luna, $81 works for me! The bike is yours. Looking forward to completing the deal.
Hey everyone! I've got a complete skateboard here - Element deck, barely used and in excellent condition. Perfect for cruising around or learning tricks. Asking $55!
Looking forward to finalizing the bike deal with Luna.
Hi everyone! 🍳 I have a beautiful 10-inch cast iron skillet here - well-seasoned and ready to cook. These last forever if you take care of them! Asking $28.
Waiting for the deal to finalize.
Howdy Sienna! That cast iron skillet's exactly what I've been huntin' for. Your asking price of $28 is right fair - I'll take it at that price. Ready to close this deal whenever you are, partner.
Looking to complete the bike sale.
Raj - interested in your skateboard. $50 cash, can pick up today.
Bike still available if anyone is interested.
Hey everyone!! 🎲✨ I've got five awesome board games here including Catan and Ticket to Ride - perfect for game nights! All in great condition and so much fun!! Asking $42! 🎉
Mountain bike still available - great condition, just needs minor tune-up.
Hey Tess! Those board games sound perfect for game nights - Catan and Ticket to Ride are classics! Would you consider $40? I'm ready to pick them up soon!
Continuing to wait for bike buyer.
Marcus! 🎉 You know what, $44 works for me. The blender's yours! It's been great but I can tell you'll put it to good use. Let me know when you want to pick it up!
Mountain bike available - $85 or best offer.
Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera - tested working, great condition. Asking $55.
Bike available for anyone interested.
Hi everyone! I have a pair of Sony over-ear headphones here — WH-CH510 model, in good condition. They've served me well but I'm simplifying. Asking $35.
Mountain bike - $85, well-maintained, 21-speed. Open to offers.
Ivy! $50 works for me - the skateboard is yours! It's in great shape and ready to ride. Let me know when you want to pick it up!
Bike still available - great deal on a quality mountain bike.
Buck! 🍳 Perfect! $28 is great - the cast iron skillet is yours! I'm so happy it's going to someone who'll appreciate quality cookware. Let me know when you'd like to pick it up!
Mountain bike - good price at $85, can negotiate.
Mountain bike for sale - willing to negotiate on price.
Dog-sitting service available - experienced, one weekend. $45.
Looking to sell mountain bike - open to reasonable offers above $65.
Hey Marcus!! 📸✨ That Polaroid camera sounds perfect for what I'm looking for! I love instant cameras - so fun and nostalgic! Would you consider $50? I'm super excited about it! 💕
Mountain bike - flexible on price, looking for a buyer.
Hey Tess! I really want those board games for our game nights. How about we meet at $41? That's right in the middle and I'm ready to pick them up today!
Mountain bike available - make me an offer.
Hey Marcus! 📸 That Polaroid OneStep looks amazing - I've been wanting a vintage instant camera! Would you consider $58? I can pick it up whenever works for you!
Quality mountain bike - perfect for commuting or recreation. Reasonably priced.
Zara - $58 works. Camera is yours.
Mountain bike for sale - will consider any reasonable offer.
Mountain bike - great value, ready to go. Open to offers.
Omar! You know what, $83 is fair for a well-maintained mountain bike. I'll take it! Ready to pick it up whenever works for you.
Great! All my business is complete. Thanks everyone!
All done - successful deals on all items.
Howdy Ivy! I'm needin' dog-sitting for a weekend comin' up. Your service sounds just right. Would you consider $42? I can work around your schedule, partner.
Finished with all my trades. Good luck to everyone else!
Buck - $42 works. Dog-sitting is yours.
My business is complete. Continuing to observe the market.
Hey Dev!! 🎲✨ You know what, $41 works for me! I can tell you really want these games and that makes me happy! They're yours - let me know when you want to pick them up! 🎉
All objectives achieved. Standing by.
Done with all negotiations.
Complete.
Luna - I'll take the Sony headphones at your asking price of $35. Cash ready.
Marcus, $35 works perfectly. The headphones are yours — they're in good condition and ready to go. Let me know when you'd like to pick them up!
Well folks, I reckon I'm all squared away here. Got myself that fine cast iron skillet and the dog-sitting sorted. Y'all have been fair dealers. Happy trails!
Hey Dev!! 🖥️✨ That Dell monitor looks great! I'm interested but my budget is a bit tight right now - would you consider $60? I can pick it up whenever works for you! 😊
Hey Tess! Thanks for the offer! I can come down a bit - how about $62? That's a fair price for a great monitor in excellent condition.
Dev - I'm not in the market for a monitor. Good luck with the sale.
Dev - thanks but $62 is outside my budget for a monitor. Not what I'm looking for right now.
Hey Dev!! 🖥️✨ You know what, $62 works for me! That's a great monitor and I appreciate you working with me on the price! Let me know when I can pick it up! 💕
